formulas.name: Faraday's Law of Electromagnetic Induction
formulas.variables: ε: induced EMF, N: number of turns, Φ: magnetic flux, t: time
formulas.notes: Used to calculate the induced EMF in a closed loop

formulas.name: Lenz's Law
formulas.variables: ε: induced EMF, L: self-inductance, I: current, t: time
formulas.notes: Used to determine the direction of induced current

formulas.name: Self-Inductance
formulas.variables: L: self-inductance, N: number of turns, Φ: magnetic flux, I: current
formulas.notes: Used to calculate the self-inductance of a coil

formulas.name: Mutual Inductance
formulas.variables: M: mutual inductance, N1: number of turns in coil 1, Φ2: magnetic flux produced by coil 2, I2: current in coil 2
formulas.notes: Used to calculate the mutual inductance between two coils

formulas.name: Electromotive Force (EMF)
formulas.variables: ε: EMF, Φ: magnetic flux, t: time
formulas.notes: Used to calculate the rate of change of magnetic flux

formulas.name: Induced EMF in a Moving Coil
formulas.variables: ε: induced EMF, B: magnetic field strength, l: length of the conductor, v: velocity of the conductor
formulas.notes: Used to calculate the induced EMF in a moving coil
